case_title: CLARENDON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORP. vs. TURAN, OKTAY et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-18-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY MICHAEL V MAHONEY. HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-28-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-28-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY MAHONEY MICHAEL, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-12-1999 CONTINUED FROM JUL-28-1999 TO SEP-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
